member.name: P:PlayerGrab.GrabActionName
member.summary: Input Action name for grabbing an object

member.name: P:PlayerGrab.RotationActionName
member.summary: Input Action name for rotating a held object

member.name: P:PlayerGrab.TagName
member.summary: Interact tag to search gameobjects for

member.name: P:PlayerGrab.RayLength
member.summary: Length of the ray for raycast

member.name: P:PlayerGrab.MinRotationMassFactor
member.summary: Minimum mass factor for rotating a held object
